user_input: aaja 50 litre milk aayo supplier bata, Rs 2500 diye cash ma
normalized_meaning: Today 50 litres of milk received from supplier, paid Rs 2500 cash
tax_effect: Fresh milk generally VAT exempt; verify IRD Nepal. No TDS on cash purchase below threshold.
clarification_question: Supplier ko naam ke ho? Cow milk ho ki buffalo milk? Knehi bill/receipt aayo?
erp_action: Create Purchase Entry: Debit Milk Purchase A/c NPR 2500, Credit Cash NPR 2500. Update inventory +50L milk.

user_input: ramesh traders bata 20 kg paneer kinyo, 200 per kg, credit ma
normalized_meaning: Purchased 20 kg paneer from Ramesh Traders at Rs 200 per kg on credit
tax_effect: Verify if Ramesh Traders issues VAT bill. If VAT registered supplier, input VAT credit may apply. Confirm with CA.
clarification_question: Ramesh Traders le VAT bill diye? Invoice number ke ho? Kati din credit cha?
erp_action: Create Credit Purchase Entry: Debit Stock/Purchase A/c NPR 4000, Credit Ramesh Traders Payable NPR 4000. Update inventory +20kg paneer.

user_input: customer lai 2 litre dahi bechyo Rs 120
normalized_meaning: Sold 2 litres of curd (dahi) to customer for Rs 120
tax_effect: Fresh dahi generally VAT exempt. Verify current IRD Nepal VAT schedule.

user_input: Sita le eSewa ma paisa pathayi dahi ko lagi, Rs 60

user_input: Hotel Annapurna lai daily 10 litre milk dinchhau, mahina antama paisa linchhau

erp_action: Setup recurring Sales Credit Entry. Create Hotel Annapurna ledger. Record daily delivery in milk supply register. Month-end: generate invoice and collect payment.

user_input: dudh phatio, 5 litre waste

erp_action: Create Spoilage Journal Entry: Debit Spoilage Loss A/c (at cost), Credit Milk Inventory A/c. Update stock -5L.

user_input: bijuli bill tiryo 1800 rupees

tax_effect: No VAT/TDS applicable on NEA electricity bill for small shop in most cases. Verify.

erp_action: Create Expense Entry: Debit Electricity Expense NPR 1800, Credit Cash NPR 1800.

user_input: gita le khata ma 500 tha, aaja tiryo

user_input: customer le basi dahi firtaa lyayo, Rs 80 firta diye

user_input: shop ko bhada tiryo 8000, landlord lai cash diye

erp_action: Create Rent Expense Entry: Debit Rent Expense NPR 8000, Credit Cash NPR 8000. Note: Verify TDS obligation with CA if annual rent >= threshold.

user_input: I need GST bill — customer asked

clarification_question: Dahi ko selling rate ra purchase cost kati tha? 15 kg ko paisa cash aaayo ki credit?
erp_action: Create two entries: (1) Sale Entry for 15kg, (2) Spoilage Loss Entry for 5kg. Update inventory: -20kg dahi total.

user_input: Ramesh Traders ko 4500 baaki tha, dispute cha, settle garyo 4000 ma
normalized_meaning: Had Rs 4500 outstanding payable to Ramesh Traders, settled dispute by paying Rs 4000
tax_effect: Discount received = income. May be taxable. Consult CA.
clarification_question: Payment mode ke thyo? Written settlement cha? CA lai sodhnu parcha tax implication ko lagi.
erp_action: Create Settlement Entry: Debit Ramesh Traders Payable NPR 4500, Credit Cash/Bank NPR 4000, Credit Discount Received NPR 500.

user_input: new customer aayo, 1 kg paneer lini gayo, Rs 260 diye, online transfer garyo
normalized_meaning: New customer came, took 1 kg paneer for Rs 260, paid via online bank transfer
tax_effect: Paneer VAT to verify. If shop VAT registered, apply VAT.
clarification_question: Bank transaction reference ke cha reconciliation ko lagi?
erp_action: Create Sale Entry: Debit Bank A/c NPR 260, Credit Sales-Paneer NPR 260. Update inventory -1kg. Record transaction reference.

user_input: milk 1 litre kitty ko? 65 rupees cha
normalized_meaning: What is the price of 1 litre milk? It is Rs 65
tax_effect: None
clarification_question: Cow milk ho ki buffalo milk? Yahi rate update garnu parcha ERP ma?
erp_action: Price inquiry confirmed at NPR 65/litre. If update needed: Update Item Master selling price for relevant milk type.

user_input: farmer Hari bata 25 litre milk liyeko cha, paisa 7 din pachi dinchhau
normalized_meaning: Received 25 litres milk from farmer Hari, will pay him in 7 days
tax_effect: Local farmer likely not VAT registered. Purchase from unregistered supplier — no input VAT.
clarification_question: Rate per litre kati cha Hari ko? Specific due date tarikh ke ho?
erp_action: Create Credit Purchase Entry: Debit Purchase-Milk, Credit Hari Payable A/c (at 25L x rate). Set payment due reminder for 7 days.

user_input: aaj milk 70L aayo, 60L bechyo, 10L baaki cha
normalized_meaning: Today 70L milk arrived, 60L sold, 10L remaining
inventory_effect: Opening 0 (or previous closing) + Received 70L - Sold 60L = Closing 10L
tax_effect: None for stock count. Tax on transactions separately.
clarification_question: Purchase rate ra selling rate kati tha? Paisa kasari aaayo — cash, esewa, credit?
erp_action: Update daily milk register: Received 70L, Sold 60L, Closing 10L. Create purchase and sale entries separately after rate confirmation.

user_input: cheque aayo customer bata, Rs 2500, Laxmi Bank ko
normalized_meaning: Received cheque of Rs 2500 from customer, drawn on Laxmi Bank
debit_accounts: Cheque in Hand / Bank Deposit (pending clearance)
inventory_effect: No inventory effect at cheque receipt stage
tax_effect: No tax effect on receipt.
clarification_question: Customer ko naam ke ho? Cheque number ke cha? Kun invoice/khata ko payment ho? Bank ma deposit garyo ki garnu baki cha?
erp_action: Create Cheque Receipt Entry: Debit Cheque-in-Hand NPR 2500, Credit Customer A/c NPR 2500. On bank clearance: Debit Bank A/c, Credit Cheque-in-Hand.

user_input: today bought 5 kg butter from Chitwan Dairy, price NPR 95 per 100g pack
normalized_meaning: Purchased 5 kg butter (in 100g packs) from Chitwan Dairy at Rs 95 per 100g pack — that is 50 packs total
tax_effect: Packaged butter VAT to verify.
clarification_question: Payment mode? Invoice received? VAT bill from Chitwan Dairy?
erp_action: Create Purchase Entry: Debit Purchase-Butter NPR 4750, Credit Cash/Chitwan Dairy Payable NPR 4750. Update inventory +50 pcs butter.

user_input: Sujal ko 200 ml milk pack, 24 pcs ek crate, kinaryo 3 crate
normalized_meaning: Purchased 3 crates of Sujal 200ml milk packs (24 pcs per crate = 72 pcs total)
tax_effect: Branded packaged milk VAT status to verify with IRD Nepal.
amount: 72 x price per pack (price not given)
clarification_question: Ek pack ko rate kati cha? Cash diye ki credit? Expiry date kati cha? VAT bill aayo?
erp_action: After price confirmation: Create Purchase Entry. Update inventory +72 pcs Sujal 200ml. Record expiry date per batch.

user_input: aaj shop bandha tha, koi transaction bhayena
normalized_meaning: Shop was closed today, no transactions occurred
inventory_effect: No change. Perishable stock may be at risk if no power for cooling.
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Record nil transaction log for today's date. Alert: Check perishable stock status — refrigeration maintained during closure?

user_input: 1kg paneer 270, 500gm paneer 140, aaj 3kg bechyo mix
normalized_meaning: Selling 1kg paneer at Rs 270 and 500gm at Rs 140. Sold 3 kg total today mixed sizes
tax_effect: Verify VAT on paneer.
amount: depends on SKU mix — cannot calculate without units of each size sold
clarification_question: 3 kg bechyo tara kati 1kg pack ra kati 500gm pack bechyo? SKU wise breakdown dinu payment calculation ko lagi.
erp_action: After SKU breakdown: Create sale entry with itemised lines. Debit Cash, Credit Sales-Paneer (1kg packs) + Sales-Paneer (500gm packs). Update inventory accordingly.

user_input: mero shop ma fire lagyo, refrigerator ra saman jali gayo
normalized_meaning: Fire broke out in my shop, refrigerator and stock burned
inventory_effect: All inventory written off at cost
tax_effect: Insurance claim = income if received. Fire loss deductibility: consult CA and Income Tax Act Nepal. Keep all documents.
clarification_question: Insurance cha? Police/fire brigade report cha? Total stock ra fixed asset ko value kati tha? CA lai turant contact garnus.
erp_action: Write off all inventory and affected fixed assets. Debit Extraordinary Loss A/c, Credit respective asset accounts. File insurance claim if applicable. Record all supporting documents.

user_input: interest aayo bank bata 340 rupees, savings account ma
normalized_meaning: Received Rs 340 interest from bank savings account
tax_effect: Bank may deduct TDS on interest. If TDS deducted, record TDS receivable. Net interest = gross interest - TDS.
clarification_question: Bank le TDS kateko cha? Bank passbook ma net amount kati cha? Kun bank ra account number?
erp_action: Create Income Entry: Debit Bank A/c NPR 340 (or net), Credit Interest Income NPR 340. If TDS deducted: Debit Bank NPR net, Debit TDS Recoverable, Credit Interest Income gross.

user_input: new stock aayo tara paisa nai chaina tirna, kal dinchhau bhanyo supplier lai
normalized_meaning: New stock arrived but have no money to pay now, told supplier will pay tomorrow
tax_effect: Normal purchase — tax entry as per invoice when received.
clarification_question: K k saman aayo? Quantity ra amount kati cha? Supplier ko naam ke ho? Bill/invoice aayo?
erp_action: After item/amount details: Create Credit Purchase Entry: Debit Purchase/Stock, Credit Supplier Payable. Set 1-day payment reminder.

user_input: milk packed in polythene bag, seal band garyo, diye customer lai
normalized_meaning: Milk packed in polythene bag, sealed and given to customer (sale)
tax_effect: VAT if applicable.
clarification_question: Kati litre milk diye? Kati ma bechyo? Cash aaayo ki credit?
erp_action: After details: Create Sale Entry. Update inventory.

user_input: daily expenses for today: packaging 50, transport 150, misc 80 total 280
normalized_meaning: Daily miscellaneous expenses: packaging Rs 50, transport Rs 150, misc Rs 80, total Rs 280
tax_effect: Minor amounts. No significant tax effect.
erp_action: Create Compound Expense Entry: Debit Packaging NPR 50 + Transport NPR 150 + Misc NPR 80, Credit Cash NPR 280.

user_input: पाश्चुरीकृत दूध किन्यो DDC बाट, ५० लिटर, रू ७५ प्रति लिटर
normalized_meaning: Purchased pasteurised milk from DDC, 50 litres at Rs 75 per litre
tax_effect: DDC government entity. VAT on pasteurised packaged milk to verify with IRD Nepal.
clarification_question: Payment mode ke ho? Invoice number ke cha?
erp_action: Create Purchase Entry: Debit Purchase-Pasteurised Milk NPR 3750, Credit Cash/DDC Payable NPR 3750. Update inventory +50L.

user_input: cheese expire bhayo, 5 packet dispose garyo, 120 each kineko tha
normalized_meaning: 5 packets of cheese expired and disposed, each purchased at Rs 120
inventory_effect: Decrease: Cheese stock -5 pcs (written off at cost NPR 600)
tax_effect: Input VAT reversal if VAT was claimed on purchase of this cheese. Confirm with CA.
erp_action: Create Write-off Entry: Debit Expiry Loss NPR 600, Credit Cheese Inventory NPR 600. Update stock -5 pcs cheese. Note: Check VAT reversal obligation.

user_input: ghar bhada ko lagi 2000 advance tiryo
normalized_meaning: Paid Rs 2000 advance for house/shop rent
debit_accounts: Advance Rent Deposit (Asset) or Prepaid Rent
tax_effect: TDS may apply on rent. Confirm with CA.
clarification_question: Security deposit ho ki next month ko advance bhada? Landlord ko naam ke ho?
erp_action: If security deposit: Debit Security Deposit Asset NPR 2000, Credit Cash NPR 2000. If advance rent: Debit Prepaid Rent NPR 2000, Credit Cash NPR 2000. Adjust when rent falls due.

user_input: selling price ghataayo, milk 65 bata 60 garyo, competition badhi bhayeko
normalized_meaning: Reduced milk selling price from Rs 65 to Rs 60 due to increased competition
inventory_effect: No stock change. All future sales at new price.
tax_effect: Reduced selling price affects revenue. No immediate tax entry.
clarification_question: Cow milk ki buffalo milk? Kun tarikh bata effective?
erp_action: Update Item Master: Milk selling price = NPR 60/litre effective from today. Review profit margin impact.

user_input: 500 ml lassi bottle, 15 pcs banaayo ghar ma, bech na jani sakyo
normalized_meaning: Made 15 bottles of 500ml lassi at home/shop, couldn't sell them all
inventory_effect: Closing stock: lassi (unsold qty) at cost
tax_effect: In-house production — no purchase entry. Cost = raw material (milk) used.
clarification_question: Kati pcs bechyo? Kati baki cha? Production ma kati litre milk use garyo? Selling price kati rakhe?
erp_action: Record in-house production: Transfer milk used from milk inventory to lassi inventory at cost. Then record sales separately. Unsold = closing stock.

user_input: tax time aayo, CA lai dinu parcha sab hisab
normalized_meaning: Tax season arrived, need to hand over all accounts to CA
tax_effect: Income tax return, VAT return (if registered), TDS filing — all as per current Nepal Income Tax Act and VAT Act. Consult CA/ICAN registered accountant.
erp_action: Generate Year-End Reports: (1) Trial Balance, (2) Profit & Loss Statement, (3) Balance Sheet, (4) Debtor/Creditor aging, (5) Closing Stock valuation, (6) TDS summary, (7) VAT summary (if applicable). Export for CA review.

user_input: customer le milk maa pani milako cha bhanyo, complaint garyo
normalized_meaning: Customer complained that milk has been adulterated with water
inventory_effect: Consider quality inspection of current stock
tax_effect: None
erp_action: No accounting entry. Log customer complaint. Investigate stock quality. Consider: refund/replacement to customer (record if refund given). Quality check with supplier. Note: adulteration is a legal offence under Nepal food laws.

user_input: ghee ko stock check garnu cha, kati cha?
normalized_meaning: Need to check ghee stock, how much is available?
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Fetch Ghee Inventory balance. Display: current stock in kg by product/brand if multiple types.

user_input: esewa settlement aako, 1500 bank account ma aaayo
normalized_meaning: eSewa settlement received, Rs 1500 credited to bank account
tax_effect: Settlement is internal fund transfer. No tax effect. Ensure original sales entries already booked when sales were made.
erp_action: Create Bank Transfer Entry: Debit Bank A/c NPR 1500, Credit eSewa Wallet A/c NPR 1500. Reconcile against eSewa settlement report.

user_input: Khalti balance check gara, kati cha?
normalized_meaning: Check Khalti wallet balance, how much is there?
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Fetch Khalti Wallet Account balance from ERP books. Display current book balance. Reconcile against Khalti app statement if needed.

user_input: today is pooja, no sales, just cleaning done
normalized_meaning: Public holiday/pooja, no sales today, only cleaning done
inventory_effect: No change except perishable risk if stock not monitored
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Log nil transaction day. Note: check perishable stock conditions. No journal entry needed.

user_input: Hari lai 500 diye, aafno paisa haina, company ko cash bata
normalized_meaning: Paid Rs 500 to Hari from business cash (distinguishing from personal funds)
debit_accounts: Hari - (need to determine: supplier, employee, or other)
inventory_effect: None unless payment is for goods
tax_effect: Depends on nature of payment
clarification_question: Hari ko sath kina payment garyo? Supplier ko paisa ho, salary ho, loan ho, ki aaru? Yhi bujhpachi sahi entry garnu parchha.
erp_action: Clarify nature of payment before entry. Once confirmed: Create appropriate entry (Supplier payment / Salary / Loan etc.).

user_input: shop ma chhora kasam garcha, tlab dinu parchha ki nai?
normalized_meaning: Son works in the shop, asking whether to pay him salary
tax_effect: If salary paid to family member, it must be arms-length, documented, and TDS complied as applicable under Income Tax Act Nepal.
erp_action: Advisory: Paying documented salary to family member working in business is allowable but must be genuine, market-rate, and properly documented with payslip. TDS compliance required if income exceeds exemption. Consult CA.

user_input: 5 kg paneer kinyo 200 rate, bechyo 260 rate, profit kati?
normalized_meaning: Purchased 5 kg paneer at Rs 200/kg, sold at Rs 260/kg, asking profit
tax_effect: Gross profit = (260-200) x 5 = NPR 300. Net profit after expenses to be calculated separately.
erp_action: Calculate: Purchase Cost = 5x200 = NPR 1000. Revenue = 5x260 = NPR 1300. Gross Profit = NPR 300. Note: Net profit requires deducting allocated operating expenses.

user_input: customer le purano khata tiryo, Rs 1200, eSewa pathaiyo
normalized_meaning: Customer cleared old credit book (khata) balance of Rs 1200 via eSewa
tax_effect: None on collection.
clarification_question: Customer ko naam ke ho khata ledger update garna? eSewa transaction ID note gare?
erp_action: Create Collection Entry: Debit eSewa A/c NPR 1200, Credit Customer Debtor A/c NPR 1200. Update khata ledger. Record eSewa reference.

user_input: bank loan liye 2 lakh, dairy shop expand garna
normalized_meaning: Took bank loan of Rs 200,000 to expand dairy shop
inventory_effect: None (loan proceeds — used for business expansion)
tax_effect: Loan principal not income. Interest expense is deductible under Income Tax Act Nepal. Consult CA.
clarification_question: Kun bank? Loan account number ke cha? Interest rate kati? EMI kati cha per month? Collateral ke diye?
erp_action: Create Loan Receipt Entry: Debit Bank A/c NPR 200,000, Credit Bank Loan Payable NPR 200,000. Set up loan repayment schedule. Record interest entries monthly.

user_input: owner le ghar ko lagi Rs 5000 shop bata nikalyo
normalized_meaning: Owner withdrew Rs 5000 from business cash for personal use
tax_effect: Drawings are not business expense. Not tax deductible. Personal income tax implications for owner — consult CA.
erp_action: Create Drawings Entry: Debit Owner's Drawings A/c NPR 5000, Credit Cash A/c NPR 5000.

user_input: वार्षिक बन्द हिसाब गर्नु छ, स्टक गन्नु पर्छ
normalized_meaning: Need to do annual closing accounts and count stock
inventory_effect: Closing stock to be physically verified and matched with book stock. Differences = write off or adjustment
tax_effect: Closing stock value affects Cost of Goods Sold and thus taxable profit.
amount: to be determined from physical count
clarification_question: Physical stock count gareko cha? System ko book stock sanga match garnu parcha. Discrepancy cha bhane adjustment entry garnu parcha.
erp_action: Generate Stock Report from ERP. Compare with physical count. Create adjustment entry for differences: Debit/Credit Stock Adjustment A/c vs Inventory A/c. Finalize closing stock for P&L.

user_input: supplier Shyam le quality kharab milk pathayo, firtaa diye
normalized_meaning: Supplier Shyam sent poor quality milk, returned it back
credit_accounts: Purchase Return - Milk or Inventory - Milk
tax_effect: Purchase return — reverse original purchase entry partially. VAT reversal if VAT invoice involved.
clarification_question: Kati litre firtaa garyo? Pehile paisa diyeko tha ki credit tha? Shyam le cash firta dincha ki credit note dinchhha?
erp_action: Create Purchase Return Entry: Debit Shyam Payable (if credit purchase) or Debit Cash (if refund from supplier), Credit Purchase Return / Inventory A/c. Update milk stock.

user_input: aaj ghee ko 1 kg pack 10 ta aayo, 600 each, supplier Puja Dairy
normalized_meaning: Received 10 packs of 1kg ghee at Rs 600 each from Puja Dairy
inventory_effect: Increase: Ghee stock +10 kg (10 pcs x 1kg)
tax_effect: Ghee VAT to verify. Puja Dairy VAT status to check.
clarification_question: Cash diye ki credit? Invoice aayo? VAT bill cha Puja Dairy ko?
erp_action: Create Purchase Entry: Debit Purchase-Ghee NPR 6000, Credit Cash/Puja Dairy Payable NPR 6000. Update inventory +10 pcs (10kg) ghee.

user_input: Today I lost Rs 200 somewhere, petty cash missing
normalized_meaning: Petty cash shortage of Rs 200 (unaccounted loss)
tax_effect: Small cash shortage — may book as miscellaneous loss. Investigate source.
clarification_question: Counting error ho ki genuine loss cha? CCTV check gareko cha? Kasle handle gareko tha cash?
erp_action: Create Cash Shortage Entry: Debit Cash Shortage/Loss NPR 200, Credit Cash A/c NPR 200. Investigate and document reason.

user_input: monthly stock compare garyam, system ma 15kg dahi cha, actual 12kg matra cha
normalized_meaning: Monthly stock comparison: system shows 15kg dahi, actual physical count is 12kg
inventory_effect: Adjust: Dahi book stock reduced by 3 kg to match physical count
tax_effect: Write-off of 3kg at cost. Input VAT reversal may apply if VAT was claimed.
clarification_question: Dahi ko cost price kati tha per kg? Discrepancy ko reason ke hola — theft, spoilage, measurement error?
erp_action: Create Stock Adjustment Entry: Debit Inventory Shortage Loss (3kg x cost), Credit Inventory-Dahi. Update physical stock = 12kg.

user_input: customer aaako, sabai dahi liyo, 8 kg, 480 diye, esewa
normalized_meaning: Customer came and took all 8 kg dahi, paid Rs 480 via eSewa
inventory_effect: Decrease: Dahi stock -8 kg (all stock sold)
tax_effect: Fresh dahi VAT exempt. Verify.
erp_action: Create Sale Entry: Debit eSewa A/c NPR 480, Credit Sales-Dahi NPR 480. Update inventory: Dahi = 0 kg (all sold). Note: reorder if needed.

user_input: water bill tiryo 300 Rs, NEA hoina, municipality ko
normalized_meaning: Paid Rs 300 water bill from municipality (not electricity)
tax_effect: Municipal water bill — no significant tax effect.
erp_action: Create Expense Entry: Debit Water Utilities Expense NPR 300, Credit Cash NPR 300.

user_input: aaja discount diyera sale badhyo, 10% off diye sabailai
normalized_meaning: Sales increased today after giving 10% discount to all customers
inventory_effect: Stock reduced per items sold (details not given)
tax_effect: VAT on net discounted price if applicable.
clarification_question: Total kati bechyo aaj (discounted amount)? Item-wise kya kya bechyo? Cash esewa kati kati aayo?
erp_action: After total sales data: Record daily sales summary with discount line. Debit Cash/eSewa/Khalti, Credit Sales (at net price after discount). Or: Debit Cash, Debit Discount Expense, Credit Sales at full price.
